tree.name: Collin Sexton
tree.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Coby White and Mike Conley to Hornets for Collin Sexton, Ousmane Dieng, and two 2031 2nd-round picks (DEN own, NYK own). Both teams also received trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Coby White
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 7th overall by Chicago Bulls from UNC in 2019 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Mike Conley
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Kevin Huerter and Dario Saric to Pistons; Pistons traded Jaden Ivey to Bulls; Timberwolves traded Mike Conley to Bulls; Pistons traded a protected 2026 1st round pick swap to Timberwolves.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIN in Ivey 3-team trade, then sent to CHA next day

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Huerter
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Zach LaVine and a 2028 2nd round pick to Kings; Kings traded Kevin Huerter to Bulls; Kings traded De'Aaron Fox and Jordan McLaughlin to Spurs; Spurs traded Zach Collins, Tre Jones and a 2025 1st round pick (Noa Essengue) to Bulls.

assetsGivenUp.name: Zach LaVine
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Bulls traded Jimmy Butler and Justin Patton to Timberwolves for Zach LaVine, Kris Dunn, and Lauri Markkanen

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 30th overall by Chicago Bulls from Marquette in 2011 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Dario Saric
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: Bulls traded Emanuel Miller to Cavaliers; Cavaliers traded De'Andre Hunter to Kings; Kings traded Dario Saric and a 2029 2nd round pick to Bulls; Cavaliers traded a 2027 2nd round pick to Bulls.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from SAC Feb 1 in 3-team deal, then sent to DET Feb 3

assetsGivenUp.name: Emanuel Miller
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed to two-way contract Dec 27, 2024. Sent to CLE in Saric 3-team deal.
